name: Klarify
long_description:
Klarify is the AI-native operating system for mental health practices. 

Therapists hold the world together. They also run businesses, file insurance claims, write letters, fill forms, supervise new grads, and do hours of paperwork every night. Most software helps with one of those jobs. None help with all.

We're building Klara, an AI-native OS for the helpers. She starts with the hardest part, writing notes, and uses that context across the rest of practice life: handling insurance, treatment plans, clinical letters, research, client homework, supervision prep, between-session progress, and more.

5,000+ practitioners. 320,000+ sessions documented.
Privacy-first. Klara never trains on your notes or client data.

Our mission is to empower therapists, not replace them. So they can focus on the one thing only a human can do.
one_liner: AI-native operating system for mental health practices
